6 6 6-6"></path></svg></button></div></div><p class="mb-2 text-lg text-fd-muted-foreground">Learn how to use Prisma Postgres with Shopify</p><div class="prose flex-1"><h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="introduction"><a data-card="" href="#introduction" class="peer">Introduction</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<p><a href="https://www.shopify.com/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Shopify</a> is a popular platform for building e-commerce stores. This guide will show you how to connect a Shopify app to a <a href="https://www.prisma.io/postgres" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Prisma Postgres</a> database in order to create internal notes for products.</p>
<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="prerequisites"><a data-card="" href="#prerequisites" class="peer">Prerequisites</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://nodejs.org/en/download/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Node.js</a></li>
<li><a href="https://shopify.dev/docs/api/shopify-cli" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Shopify CLI</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.shopify.com/partners" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Shopify Partner Account</a> and a <a href="https://shopify.dev/docs/api/development-stores#create-a-development-store-to-test-your-app" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">development store</a></li>
</ul>
<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="1-set-up-your-project"><a data-card="" href="#1-set-up-your-project" class="peer">1. Set up your project</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>If you do not have the Shopify CLI installed, you can install it with <code>npm install -g @shopify/cli</code>.</p></div></div>
<p>To start, initialize a new Shopify app using the Shopify CLI:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">shopify</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> app</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> init</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p>During setup, you&#x27;ll be prompted to customize your app. Don&#x27;t worry—just follow these recommended options to get started quickly and ensure your app is set up for success:</p>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><ul>
<li><em>Get started building your app:</em> <code>Build a Remix app (recommended)</code></li>
<li><em>For your Remix template, which language do you want:</em> <code>JavaScript</code></li>
<li><em>App Name:</em> <code>prisma-store</code> <em>(name cannot contain <code>shopify</code>)</em></li>
</ul></div></div>
<p>Navigate to the <code>prisma-store</code> directory:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF">cd</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> prisma-store</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="2-set-up-prisma"><a data-card="" href="#2-set-up-prisma" class="peer">2. Set up Prisma</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<p>Prisma comes pre-installed in your project, but let&#x27;s take a moment to update it to the latest version. This ensures you have access to the newest features, improvements, and the best possible experience as you build your app.</p>
<p>You will be swapping to a Prisma Postgres database, so delete the <code>migrations</code> folder along with the <code>dev.sqlite</code> file, inside of the <code>prisma</code> directory.</p>
<p>You need to update a few things in the <code>schema.prisma</code> file to get it working with Remix and Prisma Postgres.</p>
<ul>
<li>Swap to the new <code>prisma-client</code> generator.</li>
<li>Update the provider to <code>postgresql</code>.</li>
<li>Update the url to the new database url.</li>
</ul>

<p>To enable your app to store notes for each product, let&#x27;s add a new <code>ProductNote</code> model to your Prisma schema.</p>
<p>This model will allow you to save and organize notes linked to individual products in your database through the <code>productGid</code> field.</p>

<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>If you are using a different database provider (MySQL, SQL Server, SQLite), install the corresponding driver adapter package instead of <code>@prisma/adapter-pg</code>. For more information, see <a href="/docs/v6/orm/overview/databases/database-drivers">Database drivers</a>.</p></div></div>
<p>Prisma Postgres allows you to create a new database on the fly, you can create a new database at the same time you initialize your project by adding the <code>--db</code> flag:</p>

data-orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_tn7lfivpfiv9db_-trigger-yarn" hidden="" id="radix-_R_tn7lfivpfiv9db_-content-yarn" tabindex="0"></div><div data-state="inactive" data-orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_tn7lfivpfiv9db_-trigger-bun" hidden="" id="radix-_R_tn7lfivpfiv9db_-content-bun" tabindex="0"></div></div>
<p>Once you&#x27;ve completed the prompts, it&#x27;s time to access your new database:</p>
<ol>
<li>
<p><strong>Open the <a href="https://console.prisma.io" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Prisma Console</a>:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Log in and select your newly created database project.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Get your database connection string:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Click the <strong>Connect</strong> button.</li>
<li>Copy the connection string that appears. It should look similar to this:</li>
</ul>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span>DATABASE_URL=&quot;postgresql://user:password@host:5432/database?sslmode=require&quot;</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Configure your environment:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Create a new <code>.env</code> file in the root of your project.</li>
<li>Paste the <code>DATABASE_URL</code> you just copied into this file.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Apply your database schema:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Run the following command to create your tables and get your database ready:</li>
</ul>

<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="3-create-your-remix-model"><a data-card="" href="#3-create-your-remix-model" class="peer">3. Create your Remix model</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<p>To keep your project organized, let&#x27;s create a new <code>models/</code> folder. Inside this folder, add a file named <code>notes.server.js</code>. This will be the home for all your note-related logic and make your codebase easier to manage as your app grows.</p>
<p>The <code>notes.server.js</code> file will contain two functions:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>getNotes</code> - This will get all the notes for a given product.</li>
<li><code>createNote</code> - This will create a new note for a given product.</li>
</ul>
<p>Start by importing the Prisma client from <code>db.server.ts</code> and creating the <code>getNotes</code> function:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark has-diff" Create your layout route</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<p>Before those functions are able to be called, our route needs a layout to sit in. This layout route will feature a button for selecting a product, and will act as the parent for your <code>ProductNotes</code> route, keeping your app organized and user-friendly.</p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="41-create-the-productnoteslayout-component"><a data-card="" href="#41-create-the-productnoteslayout-component" class="peer">4.1. Create the ProductNotesLayout component</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>

<p>Remix renders provides the ability to render a nested route. Add an <code>&lt;Outlet /&gt;</code> to the <code>routes/app.product-notes.jsx</code> file where the <code>ProductNotes</code> route will be rendered:</p>

<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="42-add-the-productnoteslayout-to-the-sidebar"><a data-card="" href="#42-add-the-productnoteslayout-to-the-sidebar" class="peer">4.2. Add the ProductNotesLayout to the sidebar</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>If you run <code>npm run dev</code>, you won&#x27;t be able to see the <code>Product Notes</code> route. To fix this, you need to add the <code>ProductNotesLayout</code> to the <code>app.jsx</code> file so it shows up in the sidebar:</p>

<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="5-create-your-product-notes-route"><a data-card="" href="#5-create-your-product-notes-route" class="peer">5. Create your product notes route</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<p>Currently, if you run <code>npm run dev</code> and navigate to the <code>Product Notes</code> route, you will see nothing once selecting a product.</p>
<p>Follow these steps to create the product notes route:</p>
<p>Create a new <code>routes/app/app.notes.$productGid.jsx</code> file which will take in the productGid as a parameter, and return the product notes associated with the product as well as a form to create a new note:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark has-diff" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="flex text-fd-muted-foreground items-center gap-2 h-9.5 border-b px-4"><div <h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="51-render-the-notes"><a data-card="" href="#51-render-the-notes" class="peer">5.1. Render the notes</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>On load, the route will need to fetch the notes for the product and display them.</p>
<p>Add a <code>loader</code> function to the route:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark has-diff" <p>You should be seeing &quot;No notes yet.&quot;. If so, you&#x27;re on the right track.</p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="52-add-the-form"><a data-card="" href="#52-add-the-form" class="peer">5.2. Add the form</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>A few things need to be added to the route in order to create a new note:</p>
<ul>
<li>Add an <code>action</code> function to the route.</li>
<li>Display a <code>Toast</code> notification when a note is created.</li>
<li>Import the <code>createNote</code> function from <code>models/note.server.js</code>.</li>
<li>Import the <code>useActionData</code> and <code>useAppBridge</code></li>
</ul>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark has-diff" <p>You should now be able to add a note to a product and see it displayed.</p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="6-test-your-route"><a data-card="" href="#6-test-your-route" class="peer">6. Test your route</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>Run <code>npm run dev</code> and navigate to the <code>Product Notes</code> route.</p>
<ul>
<li>Navigate to Product Notes on the sidebar</li>
<li>Select a product</li>
<li>Add a note</li>
<li>Verify that notes are displayed and saved correctly.</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="next-steps"><a data-card="" href="#next-steps" class="peer">Next Steps</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<p>Now that you have a working Shopify app connected to a Prisma Postgres database, you can:</p>
<ul>
<li>Extend your Prisma schema with more models and relationships</li>
<li>Add create/update/delete routes and forms</li>
<li>Enable query caching with <a href="/docs/v6/postgres/database/caching">Prisma Postgres</a> for better performance</li>
</ul>
